supplies.title: Alveary Grade 6 Science Kit
supplies.rationale: Less common supplies/materials for labs and lessons, compiled for convenience.  General safety information is provided by manufacturer(s) and in the lab books, but teachers should educate themselves regarding local regulations for safe disposal of any materials.
supplies.note: Canadian members: The Learning House is able to provide the HST kits in Canada.
supplies.maySub: comparable items, if purchased or found separately; refer to kit contents at HST website for a list of supplies included in the kits and/or lessons/lab books for a comprehensive list of supplies needed for each lab.
supplies.qty: 1 kit for 1-3 students (Could stretch to 4, if needed.)

supplies.title: Household Items - General Science: Grade 6
supplies.note:
Typically easy for students to scavenge or teachers to obtain locally:
• less than 1/2 c white vinegar
• recycled cardboard, roughly 3' x 3' 
• books or wood blocks to adjust height
• 3 colored markers
• 2 or more apples (Term 2)
• plate
• knife
• cutting board
• plastic wrap
• roughly 2' x 2' piece of substrate (recycled cardboard, wood scrap, foam core)
• 15 sheets of multipurpose paper
• any weights for testing bridge
• various supplies by student design
• printables
• computer
• optional: camera, such as found on most electronic devices
• optional: antiseptic treatments
• optional: plastic ruler
• optional: fabric scrap
• optional: wax paper
• optional: fan/hair dryer
• optional: needle and thread
• optional: cereal box to model a building
• optional: rocks
• optional: sand paper
• optional: 3-7 weights with a hole, e.g. washers or spools
• optional: string or strong thread
• optional: hammer and nail
• optional: block of scrap wood
• optional: rope
• optional: nutcracker
• optional: 4 raw eggs (Term 3)
• optional: 8 sturdy egg cups
• optional: 8 cotton balls
• optional: scrap plywood (might be the same substrate as above)
• optional: cylindrical balloon
• optional: cup that fits the top of balloon
• optional: books of various sizes

supplies.title: Prepared Microscope Slides
supplies.rationale: 25 prepared slides, including plants, insects, and animal tissues.  Scheduled in Grade 8 Natural History, high school Biology, and high school Botany, but fun to explore in grades 6+.
supplies.maySub: any variety set that includes the same/similar mounts; check lesson plans for the relevant subject for details.
supplies.usedInText:
General Science: Grade 6
Natural History: Grade 7

supplies.title: Student Microscope
supplies.rationale: Used in science beginning in Grade 4.  Optional for nature study in all grades.  Making the microscope available to examine found objects cultivates scientific curiosity.
supplies.note: Quality scopes can be found second-hand or on sale regularly.
supplies.usedInText:
Nature Walks & Scouting: Grades 1-8
General Science: Grade 6

supplies.title: Classroom Collection of Rocks and Minerals
supplies.rationale: Specimens from this kit are used in lab for grade 6.  This kit also provides an excellent range of samples for general exploration and comparison of nature study finds.

supplies.title: General Fossil Collection
supplies.rationale: Specimens from this collection are used in lab for grade 6.

supplies.title: Hand Lens
supplies.rationale: Take outside on nature walks to view specimens up close and used occasionally in science.  May want more than one, depending on student interest.
supplies.maySub: any handheld magnifier that is easy to use.
supplies.usedInText:
Nature Walks & Scouting: Grades 1-8
General Science: Grade 4
Labs: Grade 4
Labs: Grade 6

supplies.title: Scale/Balance
supplies.rationale: Students may use most any common kitchen scale/balance for science during the younger years, but at some point before high school a more accurate, precise, and sensitive scale should be obtained.
supplies.maySub: any reliable scale that goes down to 0.01g.
supplies.usedInText:
Labs: Grade 5
Labs: Grade 6
Labs: Grade 8
Science: Chemistry

supplies.title: Small Collection Containers
supplies.rationale: Take 1-2 outside on nature walks to collect specimens.  Sometimes used in science beginning in grade 3; students need 8 for lab in grade 8.
supplies.maySub: any recycled containers to collect items, such as jam, pesto, or sun-dried tomato jars; pick a regularly used pantry item and collect over time.
supplies.usedInText:
Nature Walks & Scouting: Grades 1-8
General Science: Grade 3
Labs: Grade 4
Labs: Grade 5
Labs: Grade 8

supplies.title: Bird Feeder
supplies.rationale: Provides opportunities to observe birds regularly.
supplies.maySub: any bird feeder purchased or homemade.
supplies.usedInText:
General Science: Grade 1
Nature Walks & Scouting: Grades 1-8

supplies.title: Dip Net
supplies.rationale: Take to ponds or streams for collection and observation over multiple years.
supplies.maySub: any durable net or strainer for scooping in pond and stream.

supplies.title: Small Basin
supplies.rationale: Take to ponds or streams for collection and observation over multiple years; while not necessary, this collapsible one makes for easy carrying.

supplies.title: Wild Bird Seed
supplies.usedInText:
General Science: Grade 1
Nature Walks & Scouting: Grades 1-8
